input.headline: This is the world’s coolest street. Here’s why

raw.headline: This is the world’s coolest street. Here’s why

winner: Why did the coolest street in the world get a cold shoulder from its neighbors? Because it refused to lower its temperature and join the block party.

candidates.text: Why did the street apply for a job at the North Pole? Because it wanted to be the coolest street in town!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Punchy, pun-based joke with good surprise and relevance to the headline."}

candidates.text: Why did the street refuse to cooperate during interviews? It claimed it was already the coolest and didn't want to brag too much!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Puns on 'coolest' and 'bragging' are clever and specific, fitting the headline well with a touch of humor."}

candidates.text: Why did the coolest street in the world get a cold shoulder from its neighbors? Because it refused to lower its temperature and join the block party.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'temperature' and 'block party,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity about what makes the street cool. It also doesn't fully tie back to the headline."}

candidates.text: Apparently, they've also renamed the other streets 'warmest,' 'dirtiest,' and 'most congested.' Quite a marketing strategy for this one.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the contrast between 'coolest' and other exaggerated street names, but it lacks punch and feels a bit forced. It's not fully surprising or specific enough to be highly funny."}

candidates.text: In an effort to keep things cool, residents of "This is the world's coolest street" have banned all fans, air conditioners, and even snowcones to maintain the title.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the explanation feels a bit forced and lacks natural flow. The humor is mild and could be more concise."}
